summary: All 4 phases complete. Three convention changes implemented: (1) gitignore patterns for PDF/DJVU in .gitignore, (2) SKILL.md Convert/Index/Validate updated with content-aware 4,000-line chunking and enriched index.json schema (authors, title, year, doc_type, source_format, parent_doc, page_range), (3) all documentation updated consistently across SKILL.md, literature-agent.md, commands/literature.md, EXTENSION.md, README.md, and literature-organization.md. Synced copies confirmed identical via hardlinks and symlinks.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary detailing all changes across 4 phases
